description_long: This coatrack features a sturdy, vertical metal frame with a series of evenly spaced hooks protruding from both sides, designed for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The main structure consists of two robust vertical posts connected by horizontal bars, providing stability and a classic, utilitarian appearance. The hooks are simple, rounded, and symmetrically arranged, ensuring ample hanging space for multiple items. The top of the coatrack is capped with a slightly thicker section, possibly for added strength or a subtle decorative touch. The finish is a uniform, glossy black, giving it a sleek and modern look suitable for urban environments. There are no visible decorative embellishments or additional features such as umbrella holders, emphasizing its functional design.
description: A tall, black metal coatrack with multiple evenly spaced hooks and a sleek, utilitarian design. Its glossy finish and sturdy frame make it ideal for urban indoor or entryway use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile and the protruding hooks aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width, vertical bars, and all hooks clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and hook arrangement of view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing the vertical bars and hooks from the opposite side.
